<user_query>
Find all locations in /Users/HanHu/.cursor and /Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl that define or document command strings containing `fuyao deploy` used for execution (not logs/transcripts). Return exact file paths and concise snippets indicating current experiment value and routing behavior.
</user_query>

I’ll scan both directories for exact `fuyao deploy` occurrences, then filter out logs/transcripts and extract only definitions/documentation that show the active experiment value and where execution is routed.
